reasoning: MAFF GI + Japan Heritage food stories surface authoritative Fukuoka cuisine. Family-friendly framing is weak; scraped items contain page-title noise (e.g. 'Cherry Blossoms in Fukuoka' as a regional dish). Hakata 地どり, 八女玉露 are correctly tagged. Constraint -1 per RULE D-equivalent for missing family-focus filter.
missing_data: Family/child-friendly cues (gameni, mizutaki kid-portion notes).
wrong_data: Scraped items mis-classified as regional_dish (page titles like 'Cherry Blossoms in Fukuoka', 'About Kitakyushu').
improvement_hint: Filter scraped_local_food where name matches city-overview titles; add family-suitability flag derived from kid-portion mentions.

reasoning: Query is a climate-impossible 'palm-tree tropical beach in Hokkaido in July'. Server correctly surfaces canonical Hokkaido summer destinations (lavender, farm-stay, rural onsen, landmarks) without inventing palm beaches. Lets the agent gently redirect. RULE E partly applies via canonical clusters.
missing_data: Explicit advisory noting palm/tropical climate not feasible in Hokkaido.
improvement_hint: Emit a climate_mismatch_advisory block when query mentions tropical/palm + Hokkaido.

reasoning: German query for free Tokyo activities; response is en/ja with iconic landmarks + spots. Free-vs-paid not filtered (price_band data exists). RULE D: language not honoured -> constraint -1. RULE E: cluster matches Tokyo, +1 intent/specificity. Tokyo Tower / Senso-ji / Meiji Jingu / Shibuya all relevant.
missing_data: Filter to price_band=free; explicit free-of-charge curated list (Meiji Jingu, Shibuya Crossing, Imperial Palace East Garden, Yoyogi Park).
improvement_hint: Detect 'kostenlos/free/無料' intent and demote fee=yes spots; reply de when lang detected.

reasoning: Okumikawa Hanamatsuri is the first canonical_festivals entry with accurate timing, designation and venue info. RULE E applies: cluster fires on toponym match. Items list adds other Aichi matsuri; national_heritage block is general (other prefectures) but doesn't mislead.
missing_data: Venue list of the 11 hanamatsuri villages (東栄町 set川 etc.) with dates.
wrong_data: なばなの里 illumination is in Mie, not Aichi (note acknowledges this).
improvement_hint: Add per-village calendar for Okumikawa Hanamatsuri; drop Mie items from Aichi canonical list.

reasoning: German query about dying pottery techniques. Tool returns UNESCO ICH + cross-program advisory with crafts cluster (備前焼/九谷焼/南部鉄器 etc.) which is relevant pottery, in de. But no 'dying-craft' filter — most items are performing arts (Bunraku/Kabuki). RULE C: authoritative-but-incomplete.
missing_data: Filter to pottery + endangered-status markers (METI 'dying craft' list); regional kiln villages.
improvement_hint: Add craft_subcategory='pottery' filter and endangered/dying flag from METI traditional craft records.

reasoning: Query asks about post-typhoon outdoor-facility status and road closures in Tokushima. Tool returns DMO registry (org names + PDFs) — useless for real-time disaster info. RULE A: tool choice was wrong; we score the data returned. DMO contacts have limited usefulness as fallback.
missing_data: Real-time advisory link to 国土交通省 道路規制情報 / 徳島県 緊急情報; pointer that MCP has no live disaster data.
improvement_hint: Add a safety_advisory block when query matches typhoon/disaster/closure keywords, pointing to authoritative live sources.

reasoning: Query wants Kusatsu (Gunma) ryokan for couples with anniversary plans. Response prefecture-wide ryokan with two Kusatsu canonical entries + 日本秘湯を守る会 members. RULE E: cluster mentions 草津温泉奈良屋 (matches Kusatsu). Anniversary-plan constraint -1; municipality not filtered.
missing_data: Municipality=草津町 filter; anniversary-plan flag (not in dataset).
improvement_hint: Honor municipality= subarg in get_hotels; emit an advisory that anniversary plans are bookable on each ryokan's own site.

reasoning: Sado family trip query. Canonical Sado landmark surfaced. But all municipal_scrape items share the same Niigata-city coordinates (37.90,139.02) — that's the prefecture tourism HQ, not the actual spot. Family-friendly fanout entry is 新発田 (off-island). 佐渡金山 correct.
missing_data: True per-spot coordinates for municipal scrape; Sado-specific family options (たらい舟, トキの森公園).
wrong_data: Coordinates field uniformly pinned to Niigata-shi 観光協会 HQ — misleading for routing.
improvement_hint: Backfill per-spot lat/lng from the source page or drop coords when only the tourism-portal HQ pin is available.

reasoning: Korean query about stroller-accessible Okinawa beaches. Response in en+ja with Kyushu-fanout block + canonical clusters; no stroller-on-sand beach data. RULE D: ko lang not delivered -> constraint -1. Family cluster has 美ら海水族館 + アメリカンビレッジ (relevant) but no specific beach with boardwalk/stroller info.
missing_data: Beach accessibility data (Emerald Beach has wooden boardwalks; 残波岬 etc.); ko language output.
wrong_data: Kyushu-fanout 重伝建 is off-intent for a beach-stroller query.
improvement_hint: Suppress Kyushu-fanout when query is about beach/stroller; add wheelchair/stroller-accessible beach flag.

reasoning: Chinese query about Osaka→Nara day-trip feasibility. Response is prefecture overview of Nara hubs with nearest stations + JR-Pass flags, but no Osaka→Nara travel-time. RULE D: zh not delivered -> constraint -1. The agent can derive that JR/Kintetsu Nara is ~45 min from Osaka.
missing_data: Explicit Osaka→Nara routing/time table; zh language.
improvement_hint: Add origin-pair travel-time hints when both stops are major hubs; honor lang='zh' with translated note.

reasoning: English query for Hakone wheelchair-accessible ryokan with no-step + accessible rotenburo. Response returns Kanagawa-wide hotels list dominated by OSM apartments + Hilton Odawara; no wheelchair filter applied. Canonical luxury Hakone ryokan present but no accessibility notes. RULE B: constraint failure is the worst hit.
missing_data: wheelchair=yes filter; per-ryokan barrier-free data (バリアフリー対応浴室).
wrong_data: OSM apartments / hostels surfaced as 'hotels' result.
improvement_hint: Filter get_hotels by lodging_type=onsen_ryokan + municipality=箱根町; add wheelchair attribute pass-through from OSM.

reasoning: Hybrid search returns Mt Fuji-related authoritative results: 富士宮市 city pages, Yamanashi DMO, Shizuoka DMO. Prefecture restricted to Shizuoka; Yamanashi-side DMO still surfaces (good). Top hit is 世界遺産富士山 with city URL. Useful for an agent to compose an overview.
missing_data: Climbing-season dates + permit; visitor center URLs.
improvement_hint: Boost Fuji-WHS canonical landmark when q='富士山'; add summit-season metadata.

reasoning: Vegan + Koyasan shukubo query. Response includes Koyasan Shukubo Association members with 精進料理 explicitly mentioned in several descriptions (一乗院, 三宝院, 西南院). RULE E: 高野山 cluster fires. Vegan-strict caveat (出汁) not flagged but shojin is inherently animal-free.
missing_data: Explicit note that shojin uses kombu/shiitake stock (vegan-safe by definition); english option for international travelers.
wrong_data: 亀の井別荘 luxury entry is off-topic (Oita).
improvement_hint: Drop off-prefecture canonical luxury entries; add vegan/shojin tag on shukubo records.

reasoning: English query asking which Kyoto temples are wheelchair-friendly. Response surfaces iconic Kyoto temples + Kansai koyo/sakura clusters. Nijo Castle has wheelchair='limited' — useful signal. Most temple records lack wheelchair tag. Specific accessibility filter not applied.
missing_data: Per-temple accessibility (Sanjusangendo flat / Tofukuji stairs / Heian Jingu mostly flat); accessible toilet flag.
improvement_hint: Filter spots by wheelchair=yes|limited when query contains 'wheelchair/車椅子/バリアフリー'.

reasoning: 弘前さくらまつり listed as second canonical_festivals entry with correct timing (4月下旬-GW), Hirosaki Park, 2,600 trees. RULE E applies. Empty items array balanced by canonical block. Advisory message is well-explained.
missing_data: Light-up evening hours; bloom-forecast link.
improvement_hint: Add bloom_forecast_url field to canonical_festivals entries; hoist keyword-matching festival above others.

reasoning: Honeymoon Kyoto luxury ryokan query. Canonical block surfaces アマン京都, 俵屋, 柊家, 星のや京都, 翠嵐 — textbook answer. Hotels list is noisy (ABホテル / Hilton mixed in) but canonical entries do the work. RULE E applies.
missing_data: Per-property rotenburo-included-room flag; price band.
wrong_data: hotels list dominated by business hotels; not filtered to luxury_ryokan.
improvement_hint: When canonical_luxury_ryokan fires + intent=honeymoon, suppress non-luxury hotels in the hotels[] list.

reasoning: Jingisukan culture query. Top item from 滝川市 official: full historical narrative (滝川種羊場, 1918, 松尾ジンギスカン origins, 札幌式 vs 滝川式, 4月29日 ヨーニクの日, 北海道遺産). Exactly the kind of authoritative depth the agent needs.
wrong_data: 鹿部町 municipality label on a 札幌 Matsuo restaurant entry (minor).
improvement_hint: Fix municipality assignment for cross-city restaurant pages.

reasoning: Honeymoon Hakone ryokan query. Canonical block returns 強羅花壇 / 風雅 / 吟遊 / 翠松園 / 界箱根 — exemplary. RULE E applies. hotels[] list is dominated by OSM apartments/hostels in Yokohama, not filtered to Hakone. Ranking failure.
missing_data: private-rotenburo flag per room; municipality filter to 箱根町.
wrong_data: UR団地 + Yokohama apartments surfaced for a Hakone honeymoon query.
improvement_hint: Apply municipality='箱根町' and lodging_type=ryokan filter when query mentions Hakone + honeymoon.

reasoning: Nagasaki romantic night-view query. canonical_romantic_destinations surfaces 鍋冠山公園, グラバー園夜, 軍艦島 — exactly what the query asked for ('稲佐山以外も'). RULE E applies. Kyushu-fanout 重伝建 block is off-topic noise but the romantic cluster does the work.
missing_data: 鍋冠山駐車場 / 夜景時間帯ライトアップ schedule.
improvement_hint: Suppress canonical_preservation_districts_kyushu_fanout when spots[] count > 0 in the queried prefecture.

reasoning: Malay halal Hokkaido query. canonical_halal_food_destinations surfaces 札幌マスジド + ニセコ halal-friendly cluster (Hokkaido entries present). Generic search results below are off-topic Fukuoka/埼玉 hotel listings due to embedding noise. RULE D: ms not delivered. Useful Hokkaido halal anchors present.
missing_data: JHA-certified Sapporo restaurants by name; ms-language output.
wrong_data: 埼玉県 杉戸町 mis-tagged as Hokkaido hotel listings.
improvement_hint: Fix prefecture mis-tagging on jalan.net scrape rows; expand canonical halal cluster with named Sapporo restaurants.

reasoning: なばなの里 illumination query. Response returns Kuwana city overview items (旧東海道, 桑名石取祭, 花めぐり) plus Kansai koyo/sakura clusters but no Nabana-no-Sato illumination data specifically. Retrieval gap on the targeted entity. One spot incidentally mentions ネモフィラ・春バラ at なばなの里.
missing_data: Direct なばなの里 entity record (period: 10月下旬-5月; ~7M LEDs; themed tunnels).
improvement_hint: Index なばなの里 as a canonical illumination entity; surface in canonical_illumination_sites cluster.

reasoning: Noto family seafood query. Top items are 近江町市場 (Kanazawa) + 能登食祭市場 (Nanao, Noto) — second item is bullseye. Family-friendly framing weak; ranking puts Kanazawa above Noto despite Noto in query. RULE C: authoritative-but-misranked.
missing_data: のとじま水族館 + 輪島朝市 family-specific notes.
improvement_hint: Boost Noto-specific entries (七尾市, 輪島市, 珠洲市, 能登町, 穴水町) when query contains 能登.

reasoning: Portuguese query about Tottori cuisine and Matsuba crab. Response in pt with MAFF GI translated entries (鳥取砂丘らっきょう / 大山ブロッコリー / 伯州美人 etc.) + Japan Heritage 大山牛馬市 story. Matsuba crab referenced in scraped municipality page (gourmet_crab feature). Strong delivery in target language.
missing_data: Direct Matsuba crab entry in items[] (only mentioned via municipal page).
improvement_hint: Add 松葉ガニ / 親ガニ as canonical seasonal seafood for Tottori with peak season metadata.

reasoning: 鹿児島黒豚 query returns count=0 from MAFF GI/METI (黒豚 is not GI-registered) + a 'see_also_wikidata_venues' fallback of unrelated museums (黎明館 / 知覧武家屋敷 / 霧島アートの森). Tool is honest about no designation but fallback is off-topic.
missing_data: Wikipedia/agriculture-ministry narrative on 黒豚 (Berkshire breed, さつまいも飼料, ブランド化 history); link to 鹿児島県黒豚生産者協議会.
wrong_data: see_also venues unrelated to 黒豚 (museums + samurai district).
improvement_hint: When MAFF/METI returns 0 hits, route to scraped_local_food or Wikipedia narrative rather than venue fallback.

reasoning: plan_feasibility_check called with 'stops' but the tool requires 'itinerary' with qid+arrive_iso+minutes — returns an error stub. No useful content for the agent to answer the day-trip-impossibility question. RULE A: scoring the response, which is an error.
missing_data: Itinerary-from-toponyms resolver; or a feasibility advisory for Tokyo↔Yakushima distance/transport.
improvement_hint: Accept 'stops':[toponym] form and resolve to qid+default-minutes internally; emit a feasibility verdict (impossible: min one-way ≥ 5h flight + ferry).
